allow: PowerShell(node --input-type=module -e 'const view=new DataView\(new Uint8Array\(128\).buffer\); const fileTableSize=80; view.setBigUint64\(0x40,BigInt\(fileTableSize\),true\); console.log\(fileTableSize, view.getBigUint64\(0x40,true\)\);')

PowerShell(node --input-type=module -e 'function align4\(v\){return \(v+3\)&~3} const files=[{path:"data/a.txt",data:new Uint8Array\([1,2,3]\)},{path:"data/sub/b.bin",data:new Uint8Array\([4,5]\)}]; const fileEntrySize=name=>align4\(0x20+name.length\); const fileEntries=files.map\(file=>file\); const fileTableSize=fileEntries.reduce\(\(s,f\)=>s+fileEntrySize\(f.name\),0\); console.log\(fileEntries.length,fileTableSize\); const view=new DataView\(new Uint8Array\(128\).buffer\); view.setBigUint64\(0x40,BigInt\(fileTableSize\),true\); console.log\(view.getBigUint64\(0x40,true\)\);')
